samples.prompt: Explain the use of word embeddings in Natural Language Processing
samples.response: Word embeddings are one of the most powerful tools available for Natural Language Processing (NLP). They are mathematical representations of words or phrases in a vector space, allowing similarities between words and the context in which they are used to be measured.
